---
title: "Data Explorer"
subtitle: "Select a country to view its diplomatic status timeline"
---

```{=html}
<div id="explorer-app">
  <div id="sidebar">
    <div id="controls">
      <label for="system-select" class="control-label">State system</label>
      <select id="system-select" aria-label="Select state system">
        <option value="cow">Correlates of War (COW)</option>
        <option value="gw">Gleditsch-Ward (GW + microstates)</option>
      </select>
      <label for="search-box" class="control-label">Search</label>
      <input type="text" id="search-box" placeholder="Filter countries..." aria-label="Filter countries">
      <span id="country-count"></span>
    </div>
    <div id="country-list" role="listbox" aria-label="Country list"></div>
  </div>

  <div id="main-panel">
    <div id="welcome-msg">
      <p>Select a country from the list to view its diplomatic status timeline.</p>
    </div>
    <div id="timeline-panel">
      <h3 id="timeline-title"></h3>
      <div id="timeline-bar-wrap">
        <div id="timeline-bar"></div>
        <div id="timeline-labels"></div>
      </div>
      <div id="timeline-legend"></div>
      <table id="timeline-table">
        <thead><tr><th>Start</th><th>End</th><th>Duration</th><th>Status</th><th>USDOS Name</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody id="timeline-tbody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="tooltip" class="timeline-tooltip" style="display:none;"></div>

<script>
(function() {
  var STATUS_COLORS = {
    "Embassy": "#2d6a4f",
    "Ambassador Nonresident": "#52796f",
    "Legation": "#2c5282",
    "Envoy Nonresident": "#6b98b5",
    "Consulate": "#c06014",
    "Consul Nonresident": "#d4973b",
    "Liaison": "#7c3a6d",
    "Interests": "#b07da8",
    "None": "#a8a29e"
  };

  var STATUS_ORDER = [
    "Embassy", "Ambassador Nonresident", "Legation", "Envoy Nonresident",
    "Consulate", "Consul Nonresident", "Liaison", "Interests", "None"
  ];

  var data = /* __EXPLORER_DATA__ */null;
  var currentSystem = "cow";
  var selectedAbbrev = null;
  var tooltip = document.getElementById("tooltip");

  var getEl = function(id) { return document.getElementById(id); };

  function renderList() {
    var sys = data[currentSystem];
    if (!sys) return;
    var search = getEl("search-box").value.toLowerCase().trim();
    var entries = Object.keys(sys).map(function(abbrev) {
      return {abbrev: abbrev, name: sys[abbrev].name, code: sys[abbrev].code, ranges: sys[abbrev].ranges};
    }).filter(function(e) {
      if (!search) return true;
      return e.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(search) !== -1
        || e.abbrev.toLowerCase().indexOf(search) !== -1
        || String(e.code).indexOf(search) !== -1;
    }).sort(function(a, b) { return a.name.localeCompare(b.name); });

    getEl("country-count").textContent = entries.length + " countries";

    var list = getEl("country-list");
    list.innerHTML = "";
    for (var i = 0; i < entries.length; i++) {
      var e = entries[i];
      var item = document.createElement("div");
      item.className = "country-item" + (e.abbrev === selectedAbbrev ? " selected" : "");
      item.setAttribute("role", "option");
      item.innerHTML = '<span class="country-name">' + e.name + '</span>'
        + '<span class="country-code">' + e.abbrev + '</span>';
      item.addEventListener("click", (function(abbrev) {
        return function() { showTimeline(abbrev); };
      })(e.abbrev));
      list.appendChild(item);
    }
  }

  function showTimeline(abbrev) {
    var sys = data[currentSystem];
    var info = sys[abbrev];
    if (!info) return;

    selectedAbbrev = abbrev;
    renderList();

    getEl("welcome-msg").style.display = "none";
    var panel = getEl("timeline-panel");
    // Re-trigger fade-in animation
    panel.style.display = "none";
    panel.offsetHeight;
    panel.style.display = "block";

    getEl("timeline-title").textContent =
      info.name + " (" + abbrev + ", " + currentSystem.toUpperCase() + " " + info.code + ")";

    var ranges = info.ranges;
    var minDate = new Date(ranges[0].start);
    var maxDate = new Date(ranges[ranges.length - 1].end);
    var totalMs = maxDate - minDate;

    // Timeline bar
    var bar = getEl("timeline-bar");
    bar.innerHTML = "";
    for (var i = 0; i < ranges.length; i++) {
      var r = ranges[i];
      var start = new Date(r.start);
      var end = new Date(r.end);
      var leftPct = ((start - minDate) / totalMs) * 100;
      var widthPct = ((end - start) / totalMs) * 100;

      var seg = document.createElement("div");
      seg.className = "timeline-segment";
      seg.style.left = leftPct + "%";
      seg.style.width = Math.max(widthPct, 0.3) + "%";
      seg.style.backgroundColor = STATUS_COLORS[r.status] || "#999";

      // Custom tooltip events
      (function(r) {
        seg.addEventListener("mouseenter", function(e) {
          var usdos = r.usdos ? " (" + r.usdos + ")" : "";
          tooltip.innerHTML = "<strong>" + r.status + "</strong><br>"
            + r.start + " &ndash; " + r.end + usdos;
          tooltip.style.display = "block";
        });
        seg.addEventListener("mousemove", function(e) {
          tooltip.style.left = (e.pageX + 12) + "px";
          tooltip.style.top = (e.pageY - 40) + "px";
        });
        seg.addEventListener("mouseleave", function() {
          tooltip.style.display = "none";
        });
      })(r);

      bar.appendChild(seg);
    }

    // Year axis
    var labels = getEl("timeline-labels");
    labels.innerHTML = "";
    var startYear = minDate.getFullYear();
    var endYear = maxDate.getFullYear();
    var span = endYear - startYear;
    var step = span <= 20 ? 5 : span <= 50 ? 10 : span <= 100 ? 20 : 25;
    var firstTick = Math.ceil(startYear / step) * step;
    for (var y = firstTick; y <= endYear; y += step) {
      var d = new Date(y, 0, 1);
      var pct = ((d - minDate) / totalMs) * 100;
      if (pct >= 0 && pct <= 100) {
        var lbl = document.createElement("span");
        lbl.className = "timeline-label";
        lbl.style.left = pct + "%";
        lbl.textContent = y;
        labels.appendChild(lbl);
      }
    }

    // Detail table
    var tbody = getEl("timeline-tbody");
    tbody.innerHTML = "";
    for (var i = 0; i < ranges.length; i++) {
      var r = ranges[i];
      var tr = document.createElement("tr");
      var color = STATUS_COLORS[r.status] || "#999";
      var start = new Date(r.start);
      var end = new Date(r.end);
      var days = Math.round((end - start) / 86400000) + 1;
      var years = (days / 365.25).toFixed(1);
      var duration = days < 365 ? days + "d" : years + "y";
      tr.innerHTML = "<td>" + r.start + "</td><td>" + r.end
        + "</td><td>" + duration
        + '</td><td><span class="status-dot" style="background:' + color + '"></span> ' + r.status
        + "</td><td>" + (r.usdos || "") + "</td>";
      tbody.appendChild(tr);
    }

    // Legend
    var usedStatuses = {};
    for (var i = 0; i < ranges.length; i++) {
      usedStatuses[ranges[i].status] = true;
    }
    getEl("timeline-legend").innerHTML = STATUS_ORDER
      .filter(function(s) { return usedStatuses[s]; })
      .map(function(s) {
        return '<span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-color" style="background:'
          + STATUS_COLORS[s] + '"></span>' + s + '</span>';
      })
      .join(" ");
  }

  getEl("system-select").addEventListener("change", function(e) {
    currentSystem = e.target.value;
    selectedAbbrev = null;
    getEl("timeline-panel").style.display = "none";
    getEl("welcome-msg").style.display = "block";
    renderList();
  });

  getEl("search-box").addEventListener("input", function() {
    renderList();
  });

  renderList();
})();
</script>
```
